'''jashoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waeg|waeg]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waeg|waeg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jashoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæsheyeth|jæsheyeth]] || [[word:jæsheyej|jæsheyej]] || [[word:jæsheyesh|jæsheyesh]] || [[word:jæsheye|jæsheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashoshoyoth|jashoshoyoth]] || [[word:jashoshoyoj|jashoshoyoj]] || [[word:jashoshoyosh|jashoshoyosh]] || [[word:jashoshoyo|jashoshoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashoyoth|jashoyoth]] || [[word:jashoyoj|jashoyoj]] || [[word:jashoyosh|jashoyosh]] || [[word:jashoyo|jashoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashofyoth|jashofyoth]] || [[word:jashofyoj|jashofyoj]] || [[word:jashofyosh|jashofyosh]] || [[word:jashofyof|jashofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashoyotho|jashoyotho]] || [[word:jashoyojo|jashoyojo]] || [[word:jashoyosho|jashoyosho]] || [[word:jashoyoko|jashoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashoyoth|jashoyoth]] || [[word:jashoyoj|jashoyoj]] || [[word:jashoyosh|jashoyosh]] || [[word:jashoyo|jashoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashoyothol|jashoyothol]] || [[word:jashoyojol|jashoyojol]] || [[word:jashoyoshol|jashoyoshol]] || [[word:jashoyokol|jashoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashoyothotho|jashoyothotho]] || [[word:jashoyojojo|jashoyojojo]] || [[word:jashoyoshosho|jashoyoshosho]] || [[word:jashoyoko|jashoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashoyothon|jashoyothon]] || [[word:jashoyojon|jashoyojon]] || [[word:jashoyoshon|jashoyoshon]] || [[word:jashoyokon|jashoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashoyothoro|jashoyothoro]] || [[word:jashoyojoro|jashoyojoro]] || [[word:jashoyoshoro|jashoyoshoro]] || [[word:jashoyokoro|jashoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
